ham.subject: Delivery Confirmation – Order #987654 – 2026-03-05
ham.body:
Dear Alex,

Your order #987654 from QuickShop has been shipped and is scheduled for delivery on March 8th. The tracking number is 1Z999AA10123456784. You can view the shipment status at <URL>.

If you have any questions, contact our support team at support@quickshop.com.

Thank you for shopping with us!

Best regards,
QuickShop Logistics Team

spam.subject: 🎉 Congratulations! Claim Your 1.5 BTC Reward Now!
spam.body:
Hello,

We have detected a unique opportunity to reward you with 1.5 BTC for participating in our new investment program. Your wallet has been pre-validated, but to finalize the reward, you must verify your personal details immediately.

⚡️ Time is limited – if you do not confirm within 24 hours, your reward will be forfeited.

Enter your confirmation here: <URL>.

Please note that this offer is exclusive to selected users; do not share with friends or family.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Regards,
BitGain Security Team
